name: fieldrunners_td
goal: Build an open-field Fieldrunners-style tower defense where you place turrets to stop waves of enemies
note: TD shape tokens (tower/place/waves) must suppress the brawler nudge

name: grid_td_leak
goal: place turrets on a grid to stop waves before they leak past the path

name: genuine_brawler
goal: a side-scrolling beat-em-up brawler: clear waves of thugs on each floor then fight the boss
note: no TD shape tokens -> nudge still fires

name: waves_only_no_td
goal: survive endless waves of attackers in an arena
note: waves alone (no TD shape) still triggers

name: space_starts_wave
goal: tower defense; Space starts the next wave, KeyP pauses
criteria: Space starts a wave; KeyP pauses the game
note: flow keys must be excluded from ACTION_DRAWN gate

name: build_sell_keys
criteria: Digit1 places a turret, KeyS sells the selected tower

name: real_attack_keys
criteria: KeyF throws a punch; KeyK performs a special attack
note: genuine attack keys stay in the gate set
